title: Plush Thai Tomato Curry
description: A malty, juicy Thai tomato curry that emulsifies with mantecare for a silky texture, shojin-friendly and perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, grated ginger, and chopped bell pepper, cooking until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Pour in chopped tomatoes, tomato puree, and Thai red curry paste, stirring to combine and cook for 5 minutes until tomatoes soften.
Add coconut milk, soy sauce, maple syrup, and a pinch of salt, then bring to a gentle simmer, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to low and let the curry simmer, allowing flavors to meld and the sauce to thicken, 10 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning, adding more salt or maple syrup if desired, then remove from heat.
Serve hot over steamed jasmine rice or cauliflower rice, garnished with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime.
